original_hypothesis.title: AgentVeToken Admin Can Bypass Founder Lock by Setting matureAt to Past Timestamp
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: setMatureAt() allows any address with ADMIN_ROLE on agentNft to set the matureAt timestamp to any value, including 0 or past timestamps. This bypasses the founder's initialLock intended to protect stakers by ensuring the founder's LP cannot be withdrawn for the maturity duration (e.g., 10 years).
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The trust model states that founders' initial LP stake is locked until maturity to reassure other stakers. The admin can unilaterally circumvent this by calling setMatureAt(0), enabling immediate founder withdrawal and potential LP dump.

proof_of_signal.pattern: setMatureAt has no require(_matureAt >= matureAt) check; allows reducing lock period or setting to 0

preconditions: Attacker has ADMIN_ROLE on agentNft contract
Agent has founder with initialLock that hasn't matured yet

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: setMatureAt performs direct assignment with no monotonicity check

operational_questions: Which addresses hold ADMIN_ROLE on agentNft?
What maturity durations are configured for deployed agents?
Has setMatureAt been called in production?
validation_requirements: Call setMatureAt(0) as admin, then founder calls withdraw(initialLock)
Verify withdrawal succeeds despite original maturity being years away

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Admin calls setMatureAt(0) for target veToken
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_2: Founder calls withdraw(initialLock) to extract locked LP tokens
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_3: Founder removes liquidity from Uniswap pair
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: Token price crashes; other stakers suffer losses

potential_operational_impact.operational_disruption: LP rug pull crashes token price
potential_operational_impact.affected_operations: All stakers of the affected agent

investigation_priorities.operational_anomalies: Founder withdrawals before original maturity date
investigation_priorities.behavioral_patterns: setMatureAt followed by large founder withdrawal

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
